articles.title: Extreme heat is gripping New England. An ER doctor shares how to stay safe.
articles.description:
Another stretch of dangerous heat is settling over New England this week. Here's how to stay safe.

The post Extreme heat is gripping New England. An ER doctor shares how to stay safe. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Extreme heat warnings issued for New England, affecting Boston residents this week.
ER doctors recommend hydration and avoiding outdoor activities during peak hours.
High temperatures could lead to increased emergency room visits for heat-related illnesses.

articles.title: Market Basket named a top employer in latest U.S. News & World Report list
articles.description:
The announcement comes at the heels of a high-profile corporate power struggle that saw former Market Basket CEO Arthur T. Demoulas ousted.

The post Market Basket named a top employer in latest U.S. News & World Report list appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Market Basket recognized as a top employer by U.S. News & World Report.
Recognition follows a corporate struggle leading to former CEO Arthur T. Demoulas's ousting.
This accolade may boost employee morale and attract job seekers in Boston.

articles.title: One charged with OUI after woman allegedly fell from the roof of a moving car in South Boston
articles.description:
Video of the incident “clearly shows the female party sitting and smoking something on top of the vehicle as it was moving,” police said.

The post One charged with OUI after woman allegedly fell from the roof of a moving car in South Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A woman fell from the roof of a moving car in South Boston.
Police charged the driver with Operating Under the Influence (OUI).
The incident raises safety concerns for pedestrians and drivers in the area.

articles.title: Boston magazine names Cambridge’s Fallow Kin the Best New Restaurant of 2026
articles.description:
The Cambridge farm-to-table restaurant was named Best New Restaurant in the 2026 Best of Boston awards.

The post Boston magazine names Cambridge’s Fallow Kin the Best New Restaurant of 2026 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston magazine awarded Fallow Kin as Best New Restaurant in 2026.
The farm-to-table restaurant is located in Cambridge, enhancing local dining options.
This recognition may attract more visitors and boost local economy in Cambridge.
